NEXUS Pipeline Conditions for 04/1/2026


Notice Text:

For Gas Day April 1, 2026, Nexus Gas Transmission, LLC (NEXUS) has approved and scheduled nominations at each pipeline segment and meter station up to NEXUS's operational capacity.  The following locations have been restricted due to requested nominations exceeding NEXUS's operational capacity:










Restricted Locations Scheduled and Sealed   Priority % Restricted Notes
TABS IT 4B 4A 3 2 1  
Colerain   N/A 100% 100% 100% 28% 0% 1% Due to NEXUS Posted Outage
Ypsilatini Yes               Due to DTE Posted Outage










OFO / Imbalance Notice








OFO ---







Customer Specific OFO ---







Imbalances Warnings ---

















Systemwide Notes:








Customers are advised that capacity may become available as the nomination and confirmation process continues throughout the day.










Please contact your Operations Account Representative should you have any questions.


BackPrint
